image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about influenza shift drift.
Context visual: Influenza viruses constantly change through two main processes: shift and drift.
Escalation visual: Drift is a gradual change, while shift leads to major mutations, creating new strains.
Evidence visual: Research indicates that drift can affect vaccine effectiveness each year.
Payoff visual: Understanding this helps scientists predict outbreaks and improve vaccines.
Cta visual: Want to stay updated on science? Hit follow and explore more!
